etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "in-" + "subordinate" from Latin "in-" + "subordinatus" (not under order)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Not under order; having defiant rebellion and insubordinate defiance supported by cooperation awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Not order → defiant rebellion → contemporary insubordinate defiance and insubordinate rebellion that benefits from harmony growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Not order → defiant rebellion → insubordinate defiance → harmony understanding
